sources.currentUse: M1 uses seller export imports; API integration is deferred to M3.
sources.riskNotes: Country site access, API approval, field permissions, and rate limits must be verified per account.

sources.currentUse: M1 uses Seller Center exports; API integration is deferred until app approval and scope validation.
sources.riskNotes: Seller country availability, product category permissions, and restricted product policies must be reviewed.

sources.currentUse: Russia opportunities stay in manual review first; API integration follows seller account validation.
sources.riskNotes: FBO/FBS/rFBS field differences, settlement, logistics, and restricted goods rules require separate review.

sources.currentUse: M1 uses supplier Excel files and quote sheets before any API integration.
sources.riskNotes: Supplier identity, quote freshness, MOQ, dropship support, and price history must be audited.

sources.currentUse: Candidate daily reference FX source for M1.
sources.riskNotes: Reference rates are not settlement rates; save snapshots and allow manual finance overrides.

sources.sourceName: ECB Euro Foreign Exchange Reference Rates
sources.currentUse: Secondary reference source for currency validation.
sources.riskNotes: Currency coverage must be checked, especially RUB and actual settlement currencies.

sources.currentUse: M1 uses logistics rate-card imports; tracking API can be evaluated later.
sources.riskNotes: Carrier coverage, API cost, webhook reliability, and privacy handling must be validated.

sources.currentUse: Demand trend reference captured manually or by export.
sources.riskNotes: Trend scores are relative indices and must not be treated as sales volume.
Requires an Ads account; values should be stored with source date and confidence level.

sources.currentUse: Domestic supplier payment drafts, payment status lookup, voucher capture, and reconciliation.
sources.riskNotes: Do not enable unapproved automatic payments; payment execution requires finance approval and audit logs.

sources.currentUse: Reference only for possible cross-border payment products; not part of M1 execution path.
sources.riskNotes: Product availability depends on merchant entity, country, partner, and compliance review.

sources.currentUse: Candidate source for settlement references, FX snapshots, and cross-border payout evaluation.
sources.riskNotes: Actual account eligibility, supported currencies, fees, and business entity requirements must be verified.

sources.currentUse: Candidate marketplace settlement account; use statement imports before API integration.
sources.riskNotes: Platform support, account entity, fees, withdrawal timing, and compliance requirements must be verified.

sources.currentUse: Candidate cross-border collection account; use statement imports before API integration.
sources.riskNotes: Supported marketplaces, receiving accounts, FX rate, and withdrawal fees must be verified.
